name: National Democratic Training Committee
subject: Peter, do you want to run for office?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Training Committee, TrainDemocrats
body:
Sign up for the 30-Day Challenge today!
| | | | |
---
| | | | Peter — Are you a passionate Democrat who wants to make a difference but aren’t sure how?

Do you want to help your community but can’t decide if running for office is right for you?

The NDTC 30-Day Challenge is here to help you better understand the realities of being a candidate and how to get started.

The challenge will set you up to run a successful campaign by sending you one simple task each day throughout the month of January, so that come February 1st, you’ll have a plan in place to run a successful campaign!

[Follow this link to learn more and sign up for the challenge today!](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhY2NvdW50X2lkIjoiODg5NDIyNyIsImRlbGl2ZXJ5X2lkIjoid25xa2NqYmMxcHc2dTVheDBwdGUiLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwczovL3RyYWluZGVtb2NyYXRzLm9yZy9uZHRjLTMwLWRheS1jaGFsbGVuZ2UvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9TkRUQ1x1MDAyNnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RW1haWxcdTAwMjZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MzBkY1x1MDAyNl9fcz1vNGJtdWFxam9sYzNxaGRxdmlzeSJ9)
---
| [SIGN UP NOW](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhY2NvdW50X2lkIjoiODg5NDIyNyIsImRlbGl2ZXJ5X2lkIjoid25xa2NqYmMxcHc2dTVheDBwdGUiLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwczovL3RyYWluZGVtb2NyYXRzLm9yZy9uZHRjLTMwLWRheS1jaGFsbGVuZ2UvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9TkRUQ1x1MDAyNnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RW1haWxcdTAwMjZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MzBkY1x1MDAyNl9fcz1vNGJtdWFxam9sYzNxaGRxdmlzeSJ9)
---
Peter — Running for office can seem a bit overwhelming.

You want to make a difference in your community, but you just don’t know where to start.

That’s where we come in!

Our job is to provide you with the free tools and training that you need to be successful.

That’s why over 100,000 Democrats nationwide have chosen us to help them create change in their communities. And in 2020 alone close to 1,500 candidates turned to us to help them run effective campaigns.

[Will you join them by taking the first step towards a successful campaign and sign up for the 30-Day Challenge today?](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhY2NvdW50X2lkIjoiODg5NDIyNyIsImRlbGl2ZXJ5X2lkIjoid25xa2NqYmMxcHc2dTVheDBwdGUiLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwczovL3RyYWluZGVtb2NyYXRzLm9yZy9uZHRjLTMwLWRheS1jaGFsbGVuZ2UvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9TkRUQ1x1MDAyNnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RW1haWxcdTAwMjZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MzBkY1x1MDAyNl9fcz1vNGJtdWFxam9sYzNxaGRxdmlzeSJ9)
| [SIGN UP NOW](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhY2NvdW50X2lkIjoiODg5NDIyNyIsImRlbGl2ZXJ5X2lkIjoid25xa2NqYmMxcHc2dTVheDBwdGUiLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwczovL3RyYWluZGVtb2NyYXRzLm9yZy9uZHRjLTMwLWRheS1jaGFsbGVuZ2UvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9TkRUQ1x1MDAyNnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RW1haWxcdTAwMjZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MzBkY1x1MDAyNl9fcz1vNGJtdWFxam9sYzNxaGRxdmlzeSJ9)
---
— The NDTC Team

P.S. — There’s a reason we’re proudly endorsed by top Democratic Party figures including President-elect Joe Biden, Vice President-elect Kamala Harris, and Senators Cory Booker and Elizabeth Warren — [Click here to join the 30-Day Challenge and see why.](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhY2NvdW50X2lkIjoiODg5NDIyNyIsImRlbGl2ZXJ5X2lkIjoid25xa2NqYmMxcHc2dTVheDBwdGUiLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwczovL3RyYWluZGVtb2NyYXRzLm9yZy9uZHRjLTMwLWRheS1jaGFsbGVuZ2UvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9TkRUQ1x1MDAyNnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RW1haWxcdTAwMjZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MzBkY1x1MDAyNl9fcz1vNGJtdWFxam9sYzNxaGRxdmlzeSJ9)

name: Senate Conservatives
subject: Georgia Runoff Elections
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SENATE CONSERVATIVES FUND AND NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY
body:
[Senate Conservatives Fund]

Peter:

Conservatives across the nation are standing with President Trump
in the fight for election integrity. While the media
establishment may think they get to decide the winners of our
elections, the people in our country decide once every legal vote
is counted.

In addition to upholding our election laws, we also need to STOP
CHUCK SCHUMER AND THE DEMOCRATS FROM TAKING CONTROL OF THE
SENATE. To do that, we need to win at least one of the two Senate
runoff elections in Georgia on January 5th.

PLEASE JOIN US IN SUPPORTING SENATORS DAVID PERDUE (R-GA) AND
KELLY LOEFFLER (R-GA) WITH A SPLIT CONTRIBUTION TODAY!
(HTTPS://SECURE.WINRED.COM/SCF/2020-GEORGIA-RUNOFF?UTM_SOURCE=REVV&UTM_MEDIUM=EMAIL&UTM_CAMPAIGN=21AB0E90B6319E2255D18D328646288D)

If the Democrats take over the Senate, they will abolish the
filibuster, grant statehood to DC and Puerto Rico, and expand the
seats in our courts so they can pack them with liberal activists.

THEY WANT TO PASS THE GREEN NEW DEAL, GUN CONFISCATION, OPEN
BORDERS AND TO DEFUND THE POLICE!!

We must act now to create a conservative firewall in the Senate
to stop the liberals from destroying our country.

AND WE NEED TO SEND THE LIBERAL ESTABLISHMENT A MESSAGE. We are
disgusted by the lack of election integrity in our country and we
will do everything we can to defeat those who sit on their hands
and pretend this isn't a problem.

Voter turnout in the Georgia runoff elections will be much lower
than the presidential election, which means conservatives have an
opportunity to utterly crush the Democrats.

PLEASE DO YOUR PART AND HELP US START A RED WAVE FOR
CONSERVATIVES IN 2022 THAT STARTS IN GEORGIA.
(HTTPS://SECURE.WINRED.COM/SCF/2020-GEORGIA-RUNOFF?UTM_SOURCE=REVV&UTM_MEDIUM=EMAIL&UTM_CAMPAIGN=21AB0E90B6319E2255D18D328646288D)

Our country is too great and our freedoms are too sacred to give
up without a fight. The Democrats may think they have won, but
this isn't over and we have just gotten started!

Thank you for considering this urgent request and for doing so
much to help fight for America's future.

Sincerely,

[Mary Vought Signature]

Mary Vought

Executive Director

Senate Conservatives Fund

RUNOFF COUNTDOWN

[motionmailapp.com]

SUPPORT THESE CANDIDATES TODAY

[2020 Georgia Runoff Candidates]

SAVE THE SENATE
(https://secure.winred.com/scf/2020-georgia-runoff?utm_source=revv&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=21ab0e90b6319e2255d18d328646288d)

Senate Conservatives Fund
300 Independence Ave SE
Washington, DC 20003

Senate Conservatives Fund is a grassroots organization that
promotes conservative policies and helps elect conservative
candidates to the U.S. Senate. SCF was founded by former Senator
Jim DeMint to help the grassroots change Washington.

Contributions to the Senate Conservatives Fund are not deductible
as charitable contributions. Contributions from corporations or
foreign nationals lacking permanent resident status are not
permitted. Federal law requires us to report the name, mailing
address, occupation and employer for each individual whose
contributions aggregate in excess of $200 in a calendar year. Not
paid for at taxpayer expense.

PAID FOR BY SENATE CONSERVATIVES FUND AND NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY
CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. SENATECONSERVATIVES.COM

name: Steve Chabot
subject: Slaughter in Nigeria
body:
No images? [Click here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-judywn-kujkulhluu-v/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-judywn-kujkulhluu-r/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-judywn-kujkulhluu-y/)
### [Slaughter in Nigeria](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-judywn-kujkulhluu-j/)
It's happened again. The Islamist terror group Boko Haram has once again attacked innocent civilians in Nigeria. With the current COVID surge, the aftermath of the recent election and the upcoming holiday season, odds are you didn't see mention of this latest atrocity in most news coverage. In this week's blog, I discuss why this recent attack, or any terrorist threat, must not be ignored. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-judywn-kujkulhluu-t/)
# Previous Blog Posts
[](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-judywn-kujkulhluu-i/)
### [Losing Afghanistan?](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-judywn-kujkulhluu-d/)
It was announced recently that US troop levels in Afghanistan will soon be reduced from 4500 to 2500. I am concerned that this is a mistake and in this week's blog I explain why. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-judywn-kujkulhluu-h/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-judywn-kujkulhluu-k/)
### [Suck It Up?](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-judywn-kujkulhluu-u/)
Whoopi thinks conservatives like you and me just need to "suck it up." Here's what I think about that. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-judywn-kujkulhluu-o/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-judywn-kujkulhluu-b/)
### [T](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-judywn-kujkulhluu-n/)[he Blue Wave that Wasn't](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-judywn-kujkulhluu-p/)
The election has passed and the dust has settled, however who won the presidency is far from settled. In this week's blog, I discuss this election quagmire our country is confronting and something most mainstream media is ignoring, the Democrats' and pollster promised "blue wave" failed to materialize. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-judywn-kujkulhluu-x/) [Donate](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-judywn-kujkulhluu-m/) [Get a Yard Sign](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-judywn-kujkulhluu-c/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-judywn-kujkulhluu-q/) | [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-judywn-kujkulhluu-a/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-judywn-kujkulhluu-f/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-judywn-kujkulhluu-z/)

body:

| | [Tune in now! True the Vote is going LIVE this morning!](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ3d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20lMkZUcnVlVGhlVm90ZQ==&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=328A752A20A3364)
The Georgia State Senate Government Oversight Committee has called a hearing from 8:30 am CT / 9:30 am ET - 11:30 am CT / 12:30 pm ET to discuss concerns with the election process in Georgia. Join TTV for a live stream of the hearing.
AGENDA:
To hear from:
* Secretary of State’s Office
* Fulton County Election Board

* Muscogee County Election Board
* DeKalb County Election Board

Over the last few elections, there has been concerns expressed about how elections are conducted in Georgia. We will hear how the election process went and take suggestions on what can be done to improve the process and confidence in how the election is conducted.
Anyone with firsthand knowledge of problems with the election or fraudulent activity relative to the election may submit sworn written statements of fact. A notary will be present to notarize written statements.

body:

| Friend,
President Trump is coming to Georgia to rally alongside Kelly Loeffler, David Perdue, and Bubba McDonald - and you're invited to attend!
Donald J. Trump for President, Inc. has announced that the Republican National Committee will host a Victory Rally in Valdosta, Georgia this Saturday at 7:00 PM.
The Victory Rally will feature President Donald J. Trump, Senator David Perdue, Senator Kelly Loeffler, candidate for Public Service Commissioner Lauren "Bubba" McDonald, and fellow Republicans.
Click the button below to register for the event! Hope to see you there!

clean_body: Hey Peter, I just got off a call with the team. We're concerned, and EVERY conservative should be. With the North Carolina and Alaska U.S. Senate races settled, our nation’s future now hinges on what happens in two January 5th runoff elections in Georgia... And we know that the Democrats and leftist groups are planning to spend AT LEAST $100 MILLION to win these seats and seize complete control in Washington! Today, we’re launching our KEEP GEORGIA RED FUND to hold the line and save the Senate. You know just how hard we worked to Keep Texas Red this year. The Democrats came after the Lone Star State like never before, yet we prevailed. We have a key role to play now as Georgia becomes the national battleground. This is it, Peter. If Joe Biden prevails in the presidential race, the outcome in these two runoff elections will determine whether we can stop the worst of the Democrats’ extreme-left agenda, or whether they’ll be able to roll right over us. They’d LOVE to pack the U.S. Supreme Court , ban fossil fuels , and on and on! Please don’t wait. These elections are just weeks away. You know the Democrats and wealthy leftist donors are ALL-IN to seize complete control in Washington. - For Liberty, Ted Cruz Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate 815 A Brazos, PMB 550, Austin, TX 78701 | To stop receiving emails from Ted Cruz for Senate, ${Gears.unsubscribe\(\}) to unsubscribe. id:2020-11-11-22:36:23:819t Don't want to receive any more of our emails? .

body:

Hoosier Republican,

It has never been more important that we hold the Senate. Both of Georgia’s U.S. Senate seats are headed toward runoffs in January, and they will determine the balance of power in Washington.

Currently, Republicans only hold 50 seats in the Senate to the Democrats’ 48. If Democrats pull off victories – and if we lose the presidency, too – then the deciding vote on legislation for the next two years would be Kamala Harris.

It’s time for us to stand up and support our conservative allies in Georgia and keep our majority in the Senate!

Senator David Perdue is a proven conservative and leader in the Senate, and has been a strong ally to President Trump and his America First agenda. He needs your help to keep the radical left from winning this seat. Will you please chip in right now?

body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/1ce2488c5cd7/tickets-ga-gop-defend-the-majority-rally-with-vice-president-pence-for-senators-david-perdue-and-kelly-loeffler-66539?e=02cd889ad3)
---
|
---
| **President Trump is Coming!**
We wanted to make sure you didn't miss this exciting news! Donald J. Trump for President, Inc. announced that the Republican National Committee will host a **Victory Rally** in Valdosta, Georgia on Saturday, December 5th, 2020 at 7:00 PM EST. name: Team Skarlatos
subject: In Case You Missed It
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alek for Oregon
body:
Oregon's Alek Skarlatos Recounts His Heroism Aboard High-Speed French Train In Terror Trial | [](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=222a41b1ec304d8cb3391d302bea704a&_e=JJWOpVtm_Oxu-RhdQDqvtKJnEfhooRhNmNzcNR8g8oOgYai1IbVEf0F1P6xKvpMObTF0GPOXI2knrHNXap7-pqqSBFW7XwKMnXwNkuwf7VIlFqqnuyOvoLZSsFRSF8-yhLbI_D5_0SZEv7e2QPnasWymoZE6nQqZ1Aro_bqgOm8_1AG95FRqLkHTSXXEkdUj0GhZzMGDMYyn_HezpJAPkkmYKi8zCb9RMf2OL2BXBSEZFAw0qJCHteg_q1ge4tZNkVoR-_wou_b63qcrFwB3iM-3NfQomr3nUZuLbpbTuRV1TPuGqsgCClXHw-EGBmOu1jN6sSDlhxzAvwmxyFseMt5tMT_gdRItbj1nNrsuJ5wQfTtJKpLA4VqOsFPF11chgeyQEqEsI0m7JPrtS6MnhQ%3D%3D)
---
ICYMI: Oregon's Alek Skarlatos recounts his heroism aboard high-speed French train in terror trial

One of three Americans acclaimed as heroes for tackling an alleged Islamic State gunman aboard a Paris-bound train, Oregon’s Alek Skarlatos, testified Friday that he tried to kill the man who stormed into their passenger car with an arsenal of weapons.

Skarlatos, 28, told a Paris court at the gunman’s trial that he yanked a pistol from the attacker’s hand, turned it on him and pulled the trigger, but the gun did not fire.

“I was honestly trying my best to kill or restrain him,” Skarlatos said, recounting the chaotic Aug. 21, 2015 scene aboard the high-speed Amsterdam to Paris train. Skarlatos’ testimony in Paris comes just days after he stood for election to Oregon Fourth Congressional District seat and lost.

The attack suspect, Ayoub El Khazzani, faces a maximum sentence of life in prison if he is convicted of attempted terrorist murder. The 31-year-old Moroccan, who had spent time in Syria, is being tried in a heavily guarded courtroom with three suspected accomplices.

The month-long trial that opened this week could help expose the web that linked the underworld of the Islamic State group and uncover plots to target Europe. The man considered the coordinator of the November 2015 massacre outside a stadium and at a music hall and restaurants in Paris that left 130 people dead had traveled with El Khazzani from Syria to Europe, according to investigators.

One of El Khazzani’s co-defendants, Mohamed Bakkali, is also a suspected accomplice in the Paris attacks.

El Khazzani’s defense appears to be trying to show that he did not intend to commit mass slaughter on the train a few months earlier.

He boarded in Brussels, carrying a cache of arms in a suitcase, including a Kalashnikov automatic rife, nine clips with 30 rounds each, a pistol and a cutter.

Skarlatos said that after the foiled attack, he did not immediately tell police about his intention to kill the gunman because he was uncertain about self-defense laws in France. He changed his story after seeking information from the FBI, he said later at a news conference.

Skarlatos’ lawyer stressed that El Khazzani was still a potential danger when his client tried to shoot him.

“We have to add that he did so during the fight and not after the fight, and Mr. Khazzani was still resisting against the three Americans,” lawyer Thibault de Montbrial said.

The recollections in court this week from passengers who disarmed the attacker on the fast train from Amsterdam have highlighted the split-second decisions that prevented what witnesses contend could have become a mass slaughter.

A French-American passenger, Mark Moogalian, was badly wounded by a gunshot to the back that exited his neck. Moogalian was one of two people who initially confronted the gunman as he emerged from a toilet bare-chested and holding the Kalashnikov with a backpack strapped to his front.

The heroics of a handful of passengers inspired Clint Eastwood to direct a Hollywood movie reenacting the dramatic events: “The 15:17 to Paris.”

Praise has been focused on Skarlatos, Spencer Stone and Anthony Sadler, who grew up together in California and were vacationing.

Moogalian, whose neck was spurting blood, saw the Americans move into action, with Stone diving on the gunman when he entered their train car.

“I was happy because the cavalry had arrived,” Moogalian said in testimony Thursday. He said he is alive today because of Stone, who came to his aid after the gunman was laid low by his choke hold and Skarlatos’ blows to his head with the Kalashnikov.

He “was surprisingly difficult to control,” Skarlatos testified.

When he first saw the gunman appear in their train car, “it felt like time stopped,” Skarlatos said. But he and Stone, both military men, worked in lockstep. He said he tapped Stone’s shoulder and said “Let’s go.”

Stone fell ill upon his arrival in France this week and his testimony was delayed until Monday.

Asked if the situation was more intense than during his duty in Afghanistan, Skarlatos, who at the time of the train attack was a member of the U.S. National Guard, said “much greater.”

“In my mind, we were supposed to die that day,” Skarlatos told the court.

El Khazzani pulled out weapons one after another, Sadler and Skarlatos both said in testimony: when he lost the Kalashnikov, he pulled out a pistol; when he lost that, he had a box cutter in his hand.

With El Khazzani unconscious on the ground, a British businessman, Chris Norman, said he helped tie him up with zip-ties used as makeshift handcuffs and bound his ankles with what he thinks was a pink tie. Then, he said, “I sat on him.”

The train rerouted to Arras, in northern France, where El Khazzani was arrested.

_This story originally appeared on Oregonlive.com on November 21 st_

| Paid for by Alek for Oregon
---

body:
Hundreds of ballots are being reviewed and our lead is being challenged in court at this very moment [ ](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=ebaa8490d9754bfe8a1a3f29468514fc&_e=CiP3yhIKoTSkkqKDB4N3ULATyC0j-De20Pt5GdjWJLjSxA7t15Ogp-Z4RHkESkyit6z7V5Oh5Bm5ffjpYoAp4aRebHiPlgTybr7APpG6NBGe1Q0nN5FArc6fj7709KqR5x0QpNhtjlHBIXmGxl-1alE3suiYedYEOHTA18c0YI3ACA4TCTVGwZU0BYkdSpmvfBANSuY85Z-bTIYfsm2vnLcKxHsBp3i50C7sLK56-0_5MWNeXO-qmY5_UzY9_k8-DCskp2PiIEfGfpfFQj1p7ODumcnTUWGpq_Ud47GMzPyCAu4VmXxWoa-qw8LmaykF0F4ybSe4ydF28AghBT6pE3TpOtrm2ZmpV_9_-oYqIDga7tFJyUfEmiXK3FzdqpGin6BX5e7pcBErUaSW6xHdL4rUyRHvS60W8U1ObbS_Ibx32zirQhsO4E0ZuiLqBjOLYyLC21MB1rimI8bRwMrU6uNLhalWIWgGr-VOCawJ0mc%3D) Friend, Election Day is a full month behind us –– but we still have plenty of work ahead of us if we’re going to protect our razor-thin **12 vote** lead against Anthony Brindisi. **We can’t sit on the sidelines with the stakes this high and the margins this narrow.** Hundreds of ballots are being reviewed and our lead is being challenged in court at this very moment and that’s why I need your help now more than ever to **[defend the integrity of this election outcome.](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=ebaa8490d9754bfe8a1a3f29468514fc&_e=CiP3yhIKoTSkkqKDB4N3ULATyC0j-De20Pt5GdjWJLjSxA7t15Ogp-Z4RHkESkyit6z7V5Oh5Bm5ffjpYoAp4aRebHiPlgTybr7APpG6NBGe1Q0nN5FArc6fj7709KqR5x0QpNhtjlHBIXmGxl-1alE3suiYedYEOHTA18c0YI3ACA4TCTVGwZU0BYkdSpmvfBANSuY85Z-bTIYfsm2vnLcKxHsBp3i50C7sLK56-0_5MWNeXO-qmY5_UzY9_k8-DCskp2PiIEfGfpfFQj1p7O8lCgeCFFRJbYjyw3PSyMAGn_Wuf9K908LYuAvnbLdosT8QZdZLhEY3XU0jrl8mk4pvrqwqLn84KkqUSe0CNsXZZgcXGwSlomYXJlJMAsyCweg8uY-OVE4mi_9Jwl27az3dfqyecQKlEVFUFmvq3yMUuL25Z4B-8uBJAnH2ARQr50Qw09Z33VcWrT2UczoZNKBvfYFljykBzdDWbU6bsQg%3D)** [ ](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=ebaa8490d9754bfe8a1a3f29468514fc&_e=CiP3yhIKoTSkkqKDB4N3ULATyC0j-De20Pt5GdjWJLjSxA7t15Ogp-Z4RHkESkyit6z7V5Oh5Bm5ffjpYoAp4aRebHiPlgTybr7APpG6NBGe1Q0nN5FArc6fj7709KqR5x0QpNhtjlHBIXmGxl-1alE3suiYedYEOHTA18c0YI3ACA4TCTVGwZU0BYkdSpmvfBANSuY85Z-bTIYfsm2vnLcKxHsBp3i50C7sLK56-0_5MWNeXO-qmY5_UzY9_k8-DCskp2PiIEfGfpfFQj1p7Fv3le6h8MXMawvyopIDGZvuMpt-KIvwYsTZXZ41R9odM9gh2zqp9K08f_LzhrOcrCgqOXdjpBZqDi2lOdx2_o57nwgzaj7bgkug2v6CV8gWA1jbw8vfaPk_oM84I23IRLlUp49AB6FuJm5ClDVQuV4bn-7jgY86dDg45nL4ZEfHiSjwZkPWRS0vLK4h5WPsN1-9PjDs-LujV15A7XdYcXs%3D) Friend, millions of Americans are hanging on the edge of their seats waiting to see how this election will end because they know that this race for NY-22 doesn’t just affect Upstate New Yorkers. By flipping this seat from blue to red Republicans everywhere will have a better chance at stopping the Green New Deal, Medicare for All, defunding the police, and every other radical idea on the Left’s wish list. **That’s why we’re calling on our grassroots team to step up and help us protect our lead before it’s too late._[Can I count on you to help us finish the clean_body: Hundreds of ballots are being reviewed and our lead is being challenged in court at this very moment Friend, Election Day is a full month behind us –– but we still have plenty of work ahead of us if we’re going to protect our razor-thin 12 vote lead against Anthony Brindisi. We can’t sit on the sidelines with the stakes this high and the margins this narrow. Hundreds of ballots are being reviewed and our lead is being challenged in court at this very moment and that’s why I need your help now more than ever to Friend, millions of Americans are hanging on the edge of their seats waiting to see how this election will end because they know that this race for NY-22 doesn’t just affect Upstate New Yorkers. By flipping this seat from blue to red Republicans everywhere will have a better chance at stopping the Green New Deal, Medicare for All, defunding the police, and every other radical idea on the Left’s wish list. That’s why we’re calling on our grassroots team to step up and help us protect our lead before it’s too late. name: Team Warner
subject: Bi-partisan coronavirus relief
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
|
---

| | Derek --

Mark Warner joined a bi-partisan group of Senate colleagues to propose urgently needed interim coronavirus relief in the Senate this week. It's critically important that Virginians -- and folks around the country -- get the help they need as soon as possible.

**Mark knows that we can 't wait until Joe Biden and Kamala Harris are in the White House, and believes that we can do better than the weak package introduced by Mitch McConnell.** That's why he's leading the way forward on a bi-partisan bridge package that would get folks through the next four months before we can begin rebuilding our country under the Biden administration.

The new bi-partisan framework introduced this week proposes funding for:
* Health care providers and health care systems;
* Vaccine development and distribution;
* Student loan forgiveness;
* Assistance for rental housing;
* The U.S. Postal Service; and
* Aid for the transportation industry, among other critically needed services.

**With COVID-19 infections in the United States over 13.3 million, there simply isn 't time to waste.** That's why Senator Warner is working across the aisle to cut through partisan bickering and make sure that aid makes it to the Americans who need it the most, as quickly as possible. Mark is committed to seeing this package through and continuing to advocate for the aid that Virginians need during this ongoing crisis through additional relief packages.

Mark Warner made his position clear this week: He's determined to pass this bridge package before the Senate is in recess for the holidays. **[Join us in supporting his efforts by signing our petition.](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d98e/53d9897e/5500a42e/1c88d28e/2183479993/VEsH/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/s/warner-COVIDreliefpetition")**

Thank you for your support.

Be well,
Team Warner

---
|
---

Friends of Mark Warner
1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213
Williamsburg, VA 23185

What is the Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC)?
The Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC) isn't just another alphabet soup political committee. We're the largest caucus of Republican state leaders in the nation with one unified goal: winning. Through innovative strategies and record-breaking support across all 50 states, we recruit, train, and support Republicans to state offices. Following a historically successful 2020 election cycle, state Republicans currently hold 62 of 99 state legislative chambers, 25 of 45 lieutenant governor seats, 28 of 50 secretary of state offices, and 11 of 12 independently-elected agriculture officials -- thanks in large part to the support from patriots like you. Friend,
---
Like you, I am sick and tired of seeing Omar’s squad rip apart our country.
---
That’s why I’ve formed the Freedom Force with a select group of diverse _Trump-supporting_ Republicans in the incoming Congress to fight back against the squad and enact conservative policies.
---
I recently went on Fox & Friends to bring national attention to the Freedom Force.
---
But now we need your help funding our fight so that we can get to work on DAY ONE.
---

clean_body: Introducing the Freedom Force | Friend, Like you, I am sick and tired of seeing Omar’s squad rip apart our country. That’s why I’ve formed the Freedom Force with a select group of diverse Trump-supporting Republicans in the incoming Congress to fight back against the squad and enact conservative policies. I recently went on Fox & Friends to bring national attention to the Freedom Force. But now we need your help funding our fight so that we can get to work on DAY ONE. Republicans have the most diverse group of incoming congressional members in history -- and our Freedom Force captures our diversity and energy. I am proud to fight alongside representatives from all over the nation who believe in our founding principles and know that America can never become a socialist country. But now we need you to fight by our side. Thank you, Rep. Byron Donalds Congressman-elect FL-19 Paid for by Byron Donalds for Congress. 2430 Vanderbilt Beach Road, Ste 108 PMB 260, Naples, FL 34108

name: Stephen Lawson (Team Kelly)
subject: KELLY LOEFFLER RELEASES PROSPERITY PLAN TO EMPOWER MINORITY COMMUNITIES
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Georgians for Kelly Loeffler
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE THURSDAY, DECEMBER 3, 2020 KELLY LOEFFLER RELEASES PROSPERITY PLAN TO EMPOWER MINORITY COMMUNITIES
ATLANTA - Today, conservative businesswoman and political outsider Kelly Loeffler [released](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001QU32VBYspv3WAdCUJ7aGVg1TGqNdfSN_GOkESB_OonHJ8X_003HfURmfyLIyWdxbjKj3pGfta2efeFfMPrpvOvq3wtPEl3Ax_Q5A1tRVR0gXLWcRaV8tFNz_pxzjE-n1gAqbCiCTEyABIvn60I-zSO1J76dKOvXgonvv_d_8WBS1PJ9MHOANs-53cdBN1EXkYspi9tKlqkxVDLi6PxR12pSltba2Vm3AcMjmHymTLlO-RPyROhVABiUbE5i2Hksz&c=1GB0mP9IQI6HjRTnJJo5f299P2L8IVKyCibgMaA4CMbxOOK2MfGL6g==&ch=z2bSFm5Tlun0ly2oDehsoek5eYPd65gWm5ZGW1yh3cjTP6DjVOOVMQ==) the Prosperity Plan \- a comprehensive framework designed to increase long-term opportunities for success in minority communities. Senator Loeffler's Plan builds on President Trump's [historic efforts](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001QU32VBYspv3WAdCUJ7aGVg1TGqNdfSN_GOkESB_OonHJ8X_003HfURmfyLIyWdxbQa-dXdo6Xz1ddR4uIozVV8Lw2KLf7SMQaxCg57uDT3GnPgTIrWe1DyBhyNCmMPnU7mCoI5dS-Hy-cz1GW9EvdqJWNVctGM_59B5EY4-6xAW1jWyjjOskUk130rooa9zoGwd1akkjEzTTRT7IKrexU09Jh0sNKnZapwJibgb1rLXLMXmsBp5wUVMOwRPFGkzn&c=1GB0mP9IQI6HjRTnJJo5f299P2L8IVKyCibgMaA4CMbxOOK2MfGL6g==&ch=z2bSFm5Tlun0ly2oDehsoek5eYPd65gWm5ZGW1yh3cjTP6DjVOOVMQ==) to empower America's minority communities - and will legislatively enact many components of his Platinum Plan. Click [HERE](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001QU32VBYspv3WAdCUJ7aGVg1TGqNdfSN_GOkESB_OonHJ8X_003HfURmfyLIyWdxbTmGbvJjsZGAYBxSJTE4HMNwmTFwI_rbT5h2Dxlv_N5yvOhn0tx3LAzDkHNW21qVKsZFjqHbTaxL5v9Or7WLcQ5V9NDRo7HtGjF9kyte63GSOuLY-EUP9TWVxjWsUGBdLhpyOOZKFWs8ITG1WEPjyCqXYx8S8F5zllMbMw0MYZiI4H_YpBFTSzuvt0Tf60cBx&c=1GB0mP9IQI6HjRTnJJo5f299P2L8IVKyCibgMaA4CMbxOOK2MfGL6g==&ch=z2bSFm5Tlun0ly2oDehsoek5eYPd65gWm5ZGW1yh3cjTP6DjVOOVMQ==) to read the full plan.
"As someone who spent my career in the private sector creating jobs and opportunities to lift every Georgian up, I'm proud to announce my Prosperity Plan \- which will lift minority communities to new heights of success," said Senator Loeffler. "The plan will unlock greater access to capital, dedicate more resources to support families, and ensure safety and security within communities. By employing the free-market principles and individual empowerment that generated historic growth over the last four years, minority communities will have the tools they need to thrive for generations to come."
The central legislative component of Senator Loeffler's Prosperity Plan, the Economic Empowerment for Underserved Communities Act, will [generate](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001QU32VBYspv3WAdCUJ7aGVg1TGqNdfSN_GOkESB_OonHJ8X_003HfURmfyLIyWdxb1ctmqbsRKFTM3xNz6wOsCjNFhti2ZHGgmyJkFlF211hRReIuYRAc2VMPSfNroOJ-iWT8q0D8P4qn4RUvgjtr0RdazP8qCLpl-l7JITEPnvdPR-Jjksx6WmYOeQuNdrf1pdauUlNY5g3LkTNTL_eaekYYOlw9PprvvDz7f_QZSTgJfUgDM4UlE-jGG0NcdwULr4qUP5JXyOzmHPs8VBDYHEA1Cqm0umLmYc8RMIOSpQzKGUmAtO3VXhYjRGi0tb9o&c=1GB0mP9IQI6HjRTnJJo5f299P2L8IVKyCibgMaA4CMbxOOK2MfGL6g==&ch=z2bSFm5Tlun0ly2oDehsoek5eYPd65gWm5ZGW1yh3cjTP6DjVOOVMQ==) new growth within minority communities by increasing new access to capital, encouraging long-term investment, and delivering targeted relief to minority-owned businesses. The legislation dedicates $7 billion for economic revitalization, promotes investment through new tax credits, and prioritizes federal assistance to minority-owned businesses.
In addition to granting greater access to capital and encouraging new investment in economic revitalization, Senator Loeffler's Plan will also [support families and safety](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001QU32VBYspv3WAdCUJ7aGVg1TGqNdfSN_GOkESB_OonHJ8X_003HfURmfyLIyWdxbTmGbvJjsZGAYBxSJTE4HMNwmTFwI_rbT5h2Dxlv_N5yvOhn0tx3LAzDkHNW21qVKsZFjqHbTaxL5v9Or7WLcQ5V9NDRo7HtGjF9kyte63GSOuLY-EUP9TWVxjWsUGBdLhpyOOZKFWs8ITG1WEPjyCqXYx8S8F5zllMbMw0MYZiI4H_YpBFTSzuvt0Tf60cBx&c=1GB0mP9IQI6HjRTnJJo5f299P2L8IVKyCibgMaA4CMbxOOK2MfGL6g==&ch=z2bSFm5Tlun0ly2oDehsoek5eYPd65gWm5ZGW1yh3cjTP6DjVOOVMQ==) by codifying school choice, ending federal funding of abortion, expanding tax credits for families with children, increasing funding for law enforcement, and dismantling gangs - to ensure that every member of the minority community is empowered to succeed.
###
Stephen Lawson Communications Director [stephen@kellyforsenate.com](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001QU32VBYspv3WAdCUJ7aGVg1TGqNdfSN_GOkESB_OonHJ8X_003HfUaxFwgLFgv3EOUygqsriM5W0b4olQ2Px8dl5LpjD_mY9dkAbXpywBwc9DHYBRO2aI1DF3hvN6KyuYMSS7CXUeX-cU5AVnjPhWp6OK7tiuJKr&c=1GB0mP9IQI6HjRTnJJo5f299P2L8IVKyCibgMaA4CMbxOOK2MfGL6g==&ch=z2bSFm5Tlun0ly2oDehsoek5eYPd65gWm5ZGW1yh3cjTP6DjVOOVMQ==)
---
|
Paid for by Georgians for Kelly Loeffler

name: Kat Cammack
subject: A historic time for Republican Women
body:
I am proud to serve you
---
| | | | | | [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0018lhUOgwE5yWwEGH6UpQhN8O-zVQX4WelHCOmqgiGkQb22rc04GCdgOnlsaOjTz17WexSMt2WetpFVaGHiBTK-GD_WT8i7Rp3t4FTz6iYzV7IyHtUZ1hHV0OTWofjGUCGu8xysjQud9km4fgmqkq_gsOjnCog6eheFG3j1cNOJdLpwmlwVyFM1xFpRY0WtRoV&c=cT2fdGozPWB7IqDh9XlP-Q6l-4j384l4F_VRMnNiADl2hcv1N8cZlQ==&ch=VG3_unX3hEIRDfrYnP97QfJOlBewXhnnKVAkBh3UbrY6mEZj_DoBvQ==)
---
| Patriot,
I am proud to be among the historic freshman class of Republican women who will serve in the Halls of Congress this term.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0018lhUOgwE5yWwEGH6UpQhN8O-zVQX4WelHCOmqgiGkQb22rc04GCdgOnlsaOjTz17WexSMt2WetpFVaGHiBTK-GD_WT8i7Rp3t4FTz6iYzV7IyHtUZ1hHV0OTWofjGUCGu8xysjQud9km4fgmqkq_gsOjnCog6eheFG3j1cNOJdLpwmlwVyFM1xFpRY0WtRoV&c=cT2fdGozPWB7IqDh9XlP-Q6l-4j384l4F_VRMnNiADl2hcv1N8cZlQ==&ch=VG3_unX3hEIRDfrYnP97QfJOlBewXhnnKVAkBh3UbrY6mEZj_DoBvQ==)
---
| Throughout history, it has been the strong-willed and empowering women who have brought positive change to America. Women are the pillar of American values, and with the great diversity now found in Congress, we will highlight the importance of having these values represented in our government and society.
---
| | | [HELP KAT FIGHT FOR AMERICAN VALUES](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0018lhUOgwE5yWwEGH6UpQhN8O-zVQX4WelHCOmqgiGkQb22rc04GCdgOnlsaOjTz17WexSMt2WetpFVaGHiBTK-GD_WT8i7Rp3t4FTz6iYzV7IyHtUZ1hHV0OTWofjGUCGu8xysjQud9km4fgmqkq_gsOjnCog6eheFG3j1cNOJdLpwmlwVyFM1xFpRY0WtRoV&c=cT2fdGozPWB7IqDh9XlP-Q6l-4j384l4F_VRMnNiADl2hcv1N8cZlQ==&ch=VG3_unX3hEIRDfrYnP97QfJOlBewXhnnKVAkBh3UbrY6mEZj_DoBvQ==)
---
| Republicans served as the catalysts for the 19th Amendment, giving women the right to vote. Now, with this freshman group of hardworking and dedicated Republican women, we will make sure to uphold our Constitution and reflect the power of the American Dream!
We will fight to STOP the radical socialist movement, HELP our small business succeed, PROTECT our communities, and KEEP AMERICA GREAT!
[Will you join me in this fight?](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0018lhUOgwE5yWwEGH6UpQhN8O-zVQX4WelHCOmqgiGkQb22rc04GCdgOnlsaOjTz17WexSMt2WetpFVaGHiBTK-GD_WT8i7Rp3t4FTz6iYzV7IyHtUZ1hHV0OTWofjGUCGu8xysjQud9km4fgmqkq_gsOjnCog6eheFG3j1cNOJdLpwmlwVyFM1xFpRY0WtRoV&c=cT2fdGozPWB7IqDh9XlP-Q6l-4j384l4F_VRMnNiADl2hcv1N8cZlQ==&ch=VG3_unX3hEIRDfrYnP97QfJOlBewXhnnKVAkBh3UbrY6mEZj_DoBvQ==)

clean_body: I am proud to serve you | | | | | | == | Patriot, I am proud to be among the historic freshman class of Republican women who will serve in the Halls of Congress this term. | == | Throughout history, it has been the strong-willed and empowering women who have brought positive change to America. Women are the pillar of American values, and with the great diversity now found in Congress, we will highlight the importance of having these values represented in our government and society. | | | == | Republicans served as the catalysts for the 19th Amendment, giving women the right to vote. Now, with this freshman group of hardworking and dedicated Republican women, we will make sure to uphold our Constitution and reflect the power of the American Dream! We will fight to STOP the radical socialist movement, HELP our small business succeed, PROTECT our communities, and KEEP AMERICA GREAT! == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | Thank you for your support, | == | Kat Cammack | | | | == | == == == | | Kat for Congress | 5200 NW 43rd Street, Suite 102-180, Gainesville, FL 32606 | | Sent by mailto:info@katforcongress.com

name: georgia@durbinforsenate.com
subject: Beat the GOP in Georgia
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
#
Peter,
Joe Biden turned Georgia blue -- now it's time to finish the job by flipping its two Senate seats.
Incumbent Republican Senators Kelly Loeffler and David Perdue have shown that they are in this fight for themselves -- not for the people of Georgia. From attacking affordable health care to profiting off of the pandemic, these Republicans are just looking out for their own self-interest.
**[We have a real shot at defeating the GOP in Georgia and electing Democrats Jon Ossoff and Rev. Raphael Warnock. Will you rush in $5 right now to help us flip the Senate?](https://act.durbinforsenate.%3D%3D/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-201107-georgia-runoff?refcode=em201202i_1122&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&city=Englewood&state=FL&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
People in Georgia -- and all across the country -- deserve Senators who are on their side. But in Washington, GOP Senators Kelly Loeffler and David Perdue are doing everything they can to advance their own interests and those of Mitch McConnell and Donald Trump -- not their state.
It's time to send the Republicans a message by winning these runoff elections on January 5.
**[Pitch in $5 now to help elect Jon Ossoff and Raphael Warnock -- and flip the Senate.](https://act.durbinforsenate.%3D%3D/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-201107-georgia-runoff?refcode=em201202i_1122&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&city=Englewood&state=FL&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
Thank you for your support,
Team Durbin

**[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.durbinforsenate.%3D%3D/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-201107-georgia-runoff?refcode=em201202i_1122&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&city=Englewood&state=FL&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**

"It's been an amazing four years. We are trying to do another four years. Otherwise, I'll see you in four years," the president told supporters on Tuesday night at a White House holiday party for members of the Republican National Committee. Two GOP sources who attended the function confirmed the president's comments to Fox News.

name: Rainee Taylor, Evergreen Action
subject: Every department must be a climate department
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
body:
Check out our new climate campaign.
| [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/379?t=2&akid=4903%2E53494%2EMEp29-) Friend, It's not just the EPA or the Interior. In 2021, every department must be a climate department. From the Treasury Department to the State Department, there are _so many_ levers of power that the new administration can pull to start building the just, inclusive clean energy economy we need. That's why we've launched the Five to Mobilize campaign, where we lay out five concrete steps that 21 federal agencies can take to start realizing Biden's climate vision right away. **Now, it's time to get the word out:[Share our Five to Mobilize campaign announcement today.](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/1236?t=3&akid=4903%2E53494%2EMEp29-)** | [SHARE ON FACEBOOK ](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/1236?t=4&akid=4903%2E53494%2EMEp29-)
---
[SHARE ON TWITTER ](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/1237?t=5&akid=4903%2E53494%2EMEp29-)
---
Last century, the New Deal and World War II mobilization transformed the U.S. into an industrial powerhouse, established strong social safety nets, and led to the rise of the middle class in just a few years.
That's the level of ambition the Biden-Harris administration will need in order to make its bold climate plans a reality. We need an all-out mobilization to defeat this crisis and to build a just, thriving clean energy future. That's what Evergreen's Five to Mobilize campaign is all about. **[Share it with your friends and family today!](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/1236?t=6&akid=4903%2E53494%2EMEp29-)**
Thanks,
Rainee Taylor
Digital Strategist, Evergreen Action
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](https://act.evergreenaction.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=7&akid=4903%2E53494%2EMEp29-). Contributions or gifts to EVERGREEN ACTION are not tax deductible. | PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
---

name: Bobby Jindal
subject: New OpEd: "What Are the GOP’s Views on Health Care?"
body:
[ ](http://links.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=3429482d01ca439498212092e5b5a7ce&_e=188pwwWgr5aWoJ9DvSAdmcFYP9mv_61qm0P6qtWJAqz7-Qfvev7xVaaJqVXn4CDTavkDcPwULSZjIyMufF8axWGFrAifv7BhPtyD5hvUXe5jVTU0DlGfz8nayp1StEiIpETZX9avU6AjDVVH8sEDX-F9pwgiXMdcKXHkpGJ3wmGhqC3NU9lqsNLhtk7hLn2aN20GpcXCilYi7YyU7YjF5TWgAtNbRd2drzrGgYDR5eCRBnUD0ZlBGpNM9UqBI2mA4aXh3G3qQrI80SbY5JsGHg%3D%3D) I hope you get a chance to read my latest article in the Wall Street Journal, "[What Are the GOP’s Views on Health Care?](http://links.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=3429482d01ca439498212092e5b5a7ce&_e=188pwwWgr5aWoJ9DvSAdmbE9GOlXK20_oS93eMCTKpT1pI88gAx-f2niNgIWv7PBJfgnlP8E8sB3Lw2UvqdWtXMl47rSSU5j9a__vD7hCQE9Ga7qOO7s1txJjS1Hqi8drdsTBGMGn8xXUgMItj98bUuNnvXxmhRjWKhsfuXqm0Gs02n1240ImFB8xAMEZsjC_JvU4RQQ-HY98nNxLAB9cpIuZmmY1JoNbcll1tZoSb1Iodc9__0Bdehn3jajnQ2p0hxWHt6_GpN40DAiv5vFBDA-lkL2D3WSjVD-DpkFF8yMcUi-sAS3RCztGO2k_vjT6JiOgi-E21ziGI5RZKRkwz8UsEaBL5yz1YD5o5CKqPc%3D)" Conservatives must now use their time to prepare, so they won’t be caught flat-footed next time they are in charge. Consider three questions: 1\. Do they continue fighting for a full repeal of ObamaCare spending and taxes, or do they accept current spending as the baseline? 2. Do they fight for aspirational goals or negotiate for incremental gains? 3\. Do they care more about cost saving or coverage? Sincerely, Bobby Jindal [CLICK HERE TO READ FULL ARTICLE](http://links.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=3429482d01ca439498212092e5b5a7ce&_e=188pwwWgr5aWoJ9DvSAdmbE9GOlXK20_oS93eMCTKpT1pI88gAx-f2niNgIWv7PBJfgnlP8E8sB3Lw2UvqdWtXMl47rSSU5j9a__vD7hCQE9Ga7qOO7s1txJjS1Hqi8drdsTBGMGn8xXUgMItj98bVaUAX2F-ltUPlaWKE1M3tzXxLNV0g4nzX7zWdvtpnUs7O44SF8ZnuGhFxylhDbP6HGPMc-sewRoXSDfEt7SJwJpMY6xunyywOVpWc2PLCEgzyGpb3Wt2q3hemcfTHjZATuez5_ByoYsezj2c0wsjNHigZFH9CeZgybeEczGtBSXAYRIsKZFm6z5Ki7O1giZp7uXmSq3lRnLTtv40tGb9W0%3D) Email sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com by America Next PO Box 320966, Alexandria, VA 22320 [Click here to unsubscribe.](http://links.americanxt.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_s=3429482d01ca439498212092e5b5a7ce&_t=4_0Fat0eFW6FwAHOSeZiguJBEyTum8BYA0ZJB9DGv_AyOcVtohOCIHsS8LgeS7S2J82RsNCCAdBUVkDuGuVrTMx-s0HnMdrbhCBnPpWgQWDr2lM_d9aRuFzNIMY5UrARctMqLRgmhsyw8TF0gyZBmUnGM2lvxJ91MwLoWxHWJv4%3D)

name: Tom Fitton
subject: Help us fight for the Rule of Law
body:
We will continue to blaze new trails as America's preeminent government watchdog group, and that we will continue to perform the all-important work of fighting against public corruption and for the rule of law

| |
---
|
---
|
---
| Dear Fellow American,

Judicial Watch is defending the principle that "no one is above the law" with greater impact than ever before in our 26-year history.
And **_[with your support](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52186&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMDEyMDMyMDA4MTM=)_** , we will continue to blaze new trails as America's preeminent government watchdog group and perform the all-important work of fighting _against_ public corruption and _for_ the rule of law.
Without a doubt, America needs Judicial Watch as much as we need you:
* _To be the most effective force in America_**battling successfully in courtrooms****across America for honest elections**. We do the job that the U.S. Department of Justice fails to do with legal actions that have led states (including **California** , **Indiana** , **Kentucky** and **Ohio)** to take concrete steps to clean their voter rolls. And as I write to you today, we are still pursuing lawsuits against **North Carolina** and **Pennsylvania** over their failure to follow federal election law.

* _To be the most effective force in America_**leading the fight _for_ federal immigration law enforcement and _against_ illegal sanctuary policies. **We are now preparing for trial in our historic challenge to **San Francisco '**s deadly sanctuary policy, and we are pursuing another lawsuit challenging a similar policy in California's **Santa Clara County** (San Jose).

* _To be the most effective force in America_**uncovering the truth about the****Deep State conspiracy to take down President Trump** and his administration! We are forcing the release of government documents showing how senior officials in the Obama State Department, FBI and Department of Justice corruptly pursued a corrupt investigation into Trump and his team, while working to cover up Hillary Clinton's crimes. _You can rest assured that these investigations and lawsuits will continue, whatever the result of the 2020 elections_!

As I write you today, our investigators are hard at work filing Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) requests to and lawsuits against government agencies on new fronts in our election integrity, illegal immigration/sanctuary policies and Deep State litigation. **That 's why I hope you will join our fight by _[making you best tax-deductible contribution](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52186&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMDEyMDMyMDA4MTM=)_ to Judicial Watch right now**.
**_[With your support](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52186&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMDEyMDMyMDA4MTM=)_** we will keep fighting effectively **_for_** fair and honest elections, **_for_** the rule of law (including our laws against illegal immigration), and **_against_** corruption and cover-ups of unethical politicians in both parties and politically-driven Deep State government bureaucrats. **_[With your support](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52186&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMDEyMDMyMDA4MTM=)_** we will also be prepared to respond when new challenges to the rule of law and the people's lawful "right to know" arise.
_And these days, challenges arise nearly daily_!
**_[With your support](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52186&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMDEyMDMyMDA4MTM=)_** Judicial Watch will keep fighting effectively and successfully as America's leading independent conservative watchdog in Washington. Thank you.
Sincerely,
Thomas Fitton President
| [Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52186&L=21309&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xNTMvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMDEyMDMyMDA4MTM=)

name: Holcomb Crew
subject: What does One Indiana for All mean to you?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana
body:
2020 is almost over, and most of us are ready to turn the page. It’s been a trying year for Hoosiers, there’s no doubt about it. | |
---
| [](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=a0a95281a612492584e7a392288366dc&_e=tp7jV9sWInQw4sCtajA9q-ZgCGOgvrS3c4W3ESkKHTIk59wmCGwLEfzebkLOo3vf1sR6XUuX1B3nbvYpZjOybmxfLtT9t2JrdNbOy_gwQnzl2ZV1rl0jAp0ctz7V7MlVc9y0FKA1YFvt8dwhKhCoBTIuPz_bOP1JtFZusufYAnGBGMgwu4lF2w0DCDskhMDYbeFHMM14Pksuuy4toUJz4TY_UbOVmji7CV9goHiHZB8oFiVU_JXP5RW6ANqe8ZtiVvJfR3kHPRxBdkpl5pQgpCPhjm84jBJ-btru5h7uTy3EjWMAwu6pMcS97cXNSUuj5qCpBH0UHN9j08MnUXAtV1g6U5YYaJsfW9CdM68pzZpQGmkj3Hd1t-dBEQjamWU1LIdvfSnCdmJXNGMhZdphYE5BTQGHzAj7_MQws5_RL3IcjH-Uvr8DE_fKvoTh02v7y7mYqAJTpo2cYkVqCb-eAoTYFc-CDdAlzeE6Q4ZhlMhzpXAdPMS5OZXlH1umiG-U) |
---|---|---
|
---
Friend,

_**2020 is almost over, and most of us are ready to turn the page. **_

It’s been a trying year for Hoosiers, there’s no doubt about it. But there’s light at the end of the tunnel and 2021 promises to be a banner year for Indiana families, workers, farmers, small businesses, students, teachers, and more.

With Governor Holcomb’s historic election victory in the rearview mirror, we’re now just weeks away from a new year.

**And with a new year comes more big work ahead for 2021 and beyond -- building One Indiana for All. And that requires feedback from Hoosiers from all walks of life and every corner of our great state.**
[**Share Your Thoughts**](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=a0a95281a612492584e7a392288366dc&_e=tp7jV9sWInQw4sCtajA9q-ZgCGOgvrS3c4W3ESkKHTIk59wmCGwLEfzebkLOo3vf1sR6XUuX1B3nbvYpZjOybmxfLtT9t2JrdNbOy_gwQnzl2ZV1rl0jAp0ctz7V7MlVc9y0FKA1YFvt8dwhKhCoBTIuPz_bOP1JtFZusufYAnGBGMgwu4lF2w0DCDskhMDYbeFHMM14Pksuuy4toUJz4TY_UbOVmji7CV9goHiHZB8oFiVU_JXP5RW6ANqe8ZtiVvJfR3kHPRxBdkpl5pQgpCPhjm84jBJ-btru5h7uTy2lG72-xwWjLZqcZbOYd0wAzb-g5llrKkcGw9BIwZ5Wt45x4CK4vmA1rZpwr0LK5hRaD-19qj29Do1i-ziFEv8Xljc-LgiANY1oHYpneNncpuMiI8Q6GsdXbxI9REOVuGMG_Dp55kLWuqzVadR4OXhP2VcYc0FEUWX2NMTM7zCVq-_auKchmE__FPm9vbhqgH8l2Rsf0ZLpNcX-gYY24_aa)
That’s why we’re reaching out right now. We’re asking every single member of our grassroots community to share their thoughts on what One Indiana for All looks like to them, and how they think we should be working to build it in 2021.

If you want to help us in our mission to build One Indiana for All, please share your thoughts below.
[ ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=a0a95281a612492584e7a392288366dc&_e=tp7jV9sWInQw4sCtajA9q-ZgCGOgvrS3c4W3ESkKHTIk59wmCGwLEfzebkLOo3vf1sR6XUuX1B3nbvYpZjOybmxfLtT9t2JrdNbOy_gwQnzl2ZV1rl0jAp0ctz7V7MlVc9y0FKA1YFvt8dwhKhCoBTIuPz_bOP1JtFZusufYAnGBGMgwu4lF2w0DCDskhMDYbeFHMM14Pksuuy4toUJz4TY_UbOVmji7CV9goHiHZB8oFiVU_JXP5RW6ANqe8ZtiVvJfR3kHPRxBdkpl5pQgpCPhjm84jBJ-btru5h7uTy2Gu2GsiSq_4dNBHJhv8B79yYGqfTZprFnCbjSmLMGLSHgAdmKsuR_EFD-tvHrEGJpAffnMl1xEndeXFdDNBCSO9PQK0PGaEMyGM8MrRIQfhmDtBuGdtBcm5zKuOVSF2pUzG3avEy_ebduEQEI_RtMAnLY3jcS5XiJUFl7ae_rfI2z-7BORPaSsHdsLern1wnUtz2HOnH4vaHiBibU-nkkP)
Thank you for your feedback — you’ll be hearing from us soon.

-Holcomb Crew
---

http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=dfac9256b36b48fd4bfcb7d1f5944382e72cf76a7839f60a15d0dfc7860a2431244bf5d3a22b98e5ddec6c3a27953a344b5d4453ac9ffdd7

Friend,

This may be the most important email I ever send you.

I want to provide an update on our ongoing efforts to expose the tremendous voting irregularities that took place during the ridiculously long November 3rd Election.

As President, I have no higher duty than to defend the laws of the Constitution of the United States. That is why I am determined to protect our Election system - which is under attack - but I cannot do it alone. I need YOUR HELP.

body:
with 55 uncounted ballots being added into the mix and our lead being contested in court, this fight is far from over Friend, Have you heard the latest breaking news on our fight to take back NY-22? The official count still shows Claudia with a 12 vote lead –– but a county in NY-22 just found **55 uncounted ballots** (11 of which were submitted by non-registered voters)- a MONTH after Election Day! This fight is far from over. **This is why we need you in our corner now more than ever. **

clean_body: with 55 uncounted ballots being added into the mix and our lead being contested in court, this fight is far from over Friend, Have you heard the latest breaking news on our fight to take back NY-22? The official count still shows Claudia with a 12 vote lead –– but a county in NY-22 just found 55 uncounted ballots (11 of which were submitted by non-registered voters)- a MONTH after Election Day! This fight is far from over. This is why we need you in our corner now more than ever. With margins this close, we need to do absolutely everything in our power to make sure the vote count is fair and transparent so that YOUR voice is heard. Thank you, Team Claudia \- - - Forwarded Message Below - - - From: Claudia Tenney Subject: 12 votes. That's it. To: Friend, Election Day is almost a full month behind us –– but we still have plenty of work ahead of us if we’re going to protect our razor-thin 12 vote lead against Anthony Brindisi. We can’t sit on the sidelines with the stakes this high and the margins this narrow. Hundreds of ballots are being reviewed and our lead is being challenged in court at this very moment and that’s why I need your help now more than ever to Friend, millions of Americans are hanging on the edge of their seats waiting to see how this election will end because they know that this race for NY-22 doesn’t just affect Upstate New Yorkers. By flipping this seat from blue to red Republicans everywhere will have a better chance at stopping the Green New Deal, Medicare for All, defunding the police, and every other radical idea on the Left’s wish list. That’s why we’re calling on our grassroots team to step up and help us protect our lead before it’s too late. name: Team Fair Fight
subject: Georgia- make your voting plan today!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Fight PAC, www
body:
|
---
[](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa4de/34a064cc/1a820a8f/7021c15/2711681622/VEsH/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://fairfight.com/")

| | Friend - In Georgia, we're not only in the middle of the holiday season-- we're still in election season. Our lives are busier than ever, and having a plan to navigate this time of year is essential. Make your voting plan NOW as you prepare for the weeks ahead. My plan? I requested my ballot online and I will drop it off at a drop box in my county. Join me and 1,000,000 of your fellow Georgians who have already requested their ballots and head to [peachvote.com](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa4de/34a064cc/1a820a8f/7021c12/2711681622/VEsE/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "http://peachvote.com/") today! **Monday, December 7, is the last day to register and update your registration in order to vote in the January 5 Runoff Elections!**
* If you are an eligible Georgian and you are not yet registered to vote, visit [peachvote.com](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa4de/34a064cc/1a820a8f/7021c12/2711681622/VEsF/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "http://peachvote.com/") for information on how to register.
* If you'll turn 18 by January 5, 2021 and meet all other eligibility requirements, you can register to vote, too! Do you know any young Georgians with holiday birthdays who are eligible to vote? Encourage them to register right away!
* If you are already registered, check your registration to ensure it's accurate and up to date at [peachvote.com](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa4de/34a064cc/1a820a8f/7021c12/2711681622/VEsC/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "http://peachvote.com/").

Everyone has their own reasons for voting-- I'm voting for my nieces and nephews who want to see bold action on climate change. I'm voting for my parents who depend on reliable healthcare. And I'm voting for my brother who, like many others, deserves true criminal justice reform. Let's work together to make sure all eligible Georgians in our communities are registered to vote so that they, too, can make their voices heard in choosing Georgia's next U.S. Senators and Public Service Commissioner. Questions? Call the Voter Protection Hotline at 888-730-5816 for help with registration or requesting your ballot! You can also find more information at [peachvote.com](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa4de/34a064cc/1a820a8f/7021c12/2711681622/VEsD/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "http://peachvote.com/"). [](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa4de/34a064cc/1a820a8f/7021c13/2711681622/VEsA/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://twitter.com/staceyabrams/status/1334618745608826881") \- Stacey Abrams |
